body_txt: A subtrope of Expository Theme Tune where instead of describing the plot, the whole theme of the song is about just how amazing a character is, describing how all their enemies pale in comparison and how their attacks and powers will rip them to shreds. Compare Boastful Rap , where the artist makes one about himself, or "I Am Great!" Song , where a character sings this about himself in-show. Inversion of "The Villain Sucks" Song and "The Hero Sucks" Song , which are about how amazing the character is not. If a character's job is what makes them awesome, then this overlaps with Job Song .
